prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TT-10WMINIGLUEGUN-3PC Product Type: HOT_GLUE_GUN Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 10 Watt Mini Glue Gun and Hot Glue Sticks Crafting Supplies Kit, 3pc Description: A hobby tools and crafting supplies essential, this 10 watt mini glue gun and hot glue sticks combo from ToolTreaux works with a huge variety of materials and is suitable for all kinds of arts and crafts projects. Measuring 5.5 inches tall, the glue gun is lightweight and easy to maneuver. It features a long cord with Type A plug in, a built in table safety rest, insulated aluminum hot melting nozzle and a fuse for extra safety.

The kit includes two, 4 inch hot glue sticks that are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes. Setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond.

Whether it's art and crafts, DIY, repairs, jewelry making, kids' art projects and more, the mini glue gun and hot glue sticks are a must-have for all kinds of creative projects whether at home or in a school setting. And notably, the smaller glue gun overall size makes it great for little hands and fun kid's activities.

Happy crafting. Search Terms: hobby tools arts crafts hobbyist sewing quilting crafting creative design origami clear glue home jewelry design repair construction paper fabric pottery hot melt adhesive bond thermoplastic kids activities scrapbooking staionery creative maker Features: - GLUE GUN AND HOT GLUE STICKS KIT: A hobby tools and crafting supplies essential, this 10 watt mini glue gun and hot glue sticks combo from ToolTreaux works with a huge variety of materials and is suitable for all kinds of arts and crafts projects - 10 WATT MINI GLUE GUN: Measuring 5.5 inches tall, the glue gun is lightweight and easy to maneuver! It features a long cord with Type A plug in, a built in table safety rest, insulated aluminum hot melting nozzle and a fuse for extra safety - X2 HOT GLUE STICKS INCLUDED: The 4 inch refill hot glue sticks for a glue gun are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes; Setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond - CRAFTING SUPPLIES ESSENTIAL: Whether it's art and crafts, DIY, repairs, jewelry making, kids' art projects and more, the mini glue gun and hot glue sticks are a must-have for all kinds of crafting projects; the glue gun size makes it great for smaller hands and kid's activities - SPECIFICATIONS: Glue Gun Dimensions: 5.5 x 3.75 x 1 inches; Glue Sticks Dimensions: 4 x 0.27 inches; Color: Off White, Yellow, Clear; Weight: 1.7 ounces; Plug in Type A; Kit Includes: 1 Glue Gun, 2 Hot Glue Sticks === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 10W Mini Hot Glue Gun with 2 Glue Sticks Kit

tokens.name: Mini Hot Glue Gun with Glue Sticks Kit

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 3-pc Mini Hot Glue Gun Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10 Watt Mini Glue Gun, 2 Hot Glue Sticks, Lightweight, Clear Bond, DIY Crafts, Kids Activities

openai.title_differentiation: 10 Watt, 30-60 Second Set Time, 4" Glue Sticks, Safety Rest, Insulated Nozzle, Great For Crafts And Kids
